app_release_notes: v0.16.51 - Track total rounds per barrel right on Rifle & Setup (each import adds that session's rounds automatically). Import a whole range-day folder in one drop. Setup now remembers your rifles, optics and more - right-click any saved entry to remove it. Plus polish across the Scoring tab, help, and onboarding.
